title: Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Pakistan and Turkiye back US-Iran talks at Cairo meeting

snapshot.title: Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Pakistan and Turkiye back US-Iran talks at Cairo meeting
snapshot.description: CAIRO: Foreign ministers from Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Pakistan and Turkiye reaffirmed their support for negotiations between the US and Iran during a meeting in Cairo on Sunday aimed at addressing regional tensions and promoting diplomatic efforts. Saudi Foreign Minister Prince Faisal bin Farhan joined Pakistani Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammad Ishaq Dar,
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Pakistan and Turkiye back US-Iran talks at Cairo meeting | Arab News
